use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR TREATING TYPE II DIABETES BY ADMINISTERING SAXAGLIPTIN
METHOD FOR TREATING TYPE II DIABETES MELLITUS BY ADMINISTERING SAXAGLIPTIN ALONE OR IN COMBINATION WITH INSULIN, METFORMIN, A THIAZOLIDINEDIONE, GLYBURIDE OR METFORMIN PLUS A SULFONYLUREA

indications.text:
1.1 Monotherapy and Combination Therapy
ONGLYZA is indicated as an adjunct to diet and exercise to improve glycemic control in adults
with type 2 diabetes mellitus in multiple clinical settings. [See Clinical Studies (14).]
1.2 Important Limitations of Use
